class EmptyFileSystemProvider {
    readFile() {
        throw new Error('No file system is available.');
    }
    async readDirectory() {
        return [];
    }
}
const EmptyFileSystem = {
    fileSystemProvider: () => new EmptyFileSystemProvider()
};
